elements.title: lang::report_page_105_block_1_element_1_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT CONCAT(COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(kbi_u.country), ''), 'not-informed'), '-',
              COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(kbi_u.city), ''), 'not-informed'), '-',
              COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(kbi_u.institution), ''), 'not-informed'), '-',
              COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(kbi_u.department), ''), 'not-informed')) AS id,
       COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(kbi_u.country), ''), 'Not informed') AS country,
       COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(kbi_u.city), ''), 'Not informed') AS city,
       COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(kbi_u.institution), ''), 'Not informed') AS institution,
       COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(kbi_u.department), ''), 'Not informed') AS department,
       COUNT(DISTINCT kbi_u.id) AS student_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN kbi_u.suspended = 0 AND kbi_u.deleted = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_students,
       SUM(CASE WHEN kbi_u.suspended = 1 AND kbi_u.deleted = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS suspended_students
FROM mdl_user kbi_u
       JOIN (
             SELECT DISTINCT kbi_ra.userid
             FROM mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
                    JOIN mdl_role kbi_r ON kbi_r.id = kbi_ra.roleid
                    JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.id = kbi_ra.contextid AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
             WHERE kbi_r.shortname = 'student'
       ) kbi_students ON kbi_students.userid = kbi_u.id
WHERE kbi_u.username <> 'guest'
GROUP BY country, city, institution, department
ORDER BY student_count DESC, country, city, institution, department
